name: claude-session-guardian
description: Monitor Claude Code's 5-hour and 7-day rate limit windows via background detector + reactor skill. Auto-detects zone upgrades (green/yellow/red/critical) at thresholds 50/65/75/85. At ≥85%, pauses subagents cooperatively with atomic CronCreate-first sequence (resume guaranteed even on partial failure). Also tracks 7-day window with WEEKLY_WARN at 80% and WEEKLY_CRITICAL at 90% to prevent monthly-limit-hit mid-workflow.
